State.Author: Beowulf
State.Description: Relabel exterior locations from "Skyrim" to their actual region name.
State.Name: Unique Region Names SE

State.Author: Parapets
State.Description: Wearing religious amulets gives you the ability to pray anywhere to receive blessings.
State.Name: Pray With Amulets

State.Author: powerofthree
State.Description: Cast spells in style with magic runes! Glowing glyphs will appear when casting spells or scrolls.  Compatible with Apocalypse, Mysticism, Arcanum, Elemental Destruction Magic Redux, Lost Grimoire, Forgotten Magic Redone, Ward Functionalities Extended and more.
State.Name: Strange Runes

State.Author: isoprophlex
State.Description: Dynamically adjusts interior ambient lighting based on the time of day, seamlessly integrating as an addon compatible with any existing lighting mod.
State.Name: Dynamic Interior Ambient Lighting (DIAL)

State.Author: Bottle
State.Description: Lighting mod making use of po3's light placer.
State.Name: Placed Light

State.Author: sharrken
State.Description: A high-definition restoration of Skyrim's orignal voices and music, drawing from the much higher quality PS4 audio as a source.
State.Name: Unofficial High Definition Audio Project

State.Author: Ashingda and Parapets
State.Description: Adds 11 unique icon/types to SkyUI; includes Spear, Javelin, Pike, Halberd, Rapier, Quarterstaff, Claw, Whip, Scythe, Katana, Gun. Implemented using Inventory Interface Information Injector.
State.Name: I4 - SkyUI Weapons Pack

State.Author: Parapets - edited by Miss Corruption
State.Description: Updated version of Parapets Crash Log Tools to work with MO2 2.5.0+ and earlier.
State.Name: Crash Log Tools for MO2 - Updated

State.Author: aglowinthefield
State.Description: Advanced download management for hoarders like me. Bulk mod installation, duplicate deletion, and more! Speed improvements to come as a fast follow~
State.Name: MO2 Download Manager Plus

State.Author: hakasapl
State.Description: Dynamically patch meshes to enable parallax or complex material for any load order
State.Name: ParallaxGen - Dynamic Parallax Mesh Patcher

State.Author: Community Shaders Team
State.Description: Open-source SKSE core plugin for community-driven advanced graphics modifications for AE, SE and VR. Also fixes bugs.
State.Name: Community Shaders

State.Author: powerofthree
State.Description: Applies visual effects to NPCs and the player, when killed by magic status effects.
State.Name: Frozen Electrocuted Combustion

Original.Name: QuickLoot IE - A QuickLoot EE Fork-120075-3-4-1-1739389633.zip

State.Author: MIss Corruption and ilian53
State.Description: This is a fork of Quickloot EE implementing new features, fixing the 32 items crash and having one DLL for all versions.
State.Name: Quickloot EE NG Fork

State.Author: colinswrath and CordialCupid
State.Description: Survival Mode Improved - SKSE is an SKSE plugin implementation of Skyrim's Survival Mode, more specifically, Survival Mode Improved. Survival Mode has been rebuilt from the ground up utilizing C++ (CommonLibSSE-NG) rather than Papyrus. No more straining the Papyrus VM with Survival Mode's polling and hit events, etc.
State.Name: Survival Mode Improved - SKSE

State.Author: Addi
State.Description: A complete AIO PBR texture pack of all of Skyrim's Architecture/Clutter/Actors/Dungeons true to the vanilla aesthetic
State.Name: Vanilla PBR AIO

State.Author: JonnyWang aka Megaloblast
State.Description: A weather mod that specializes on the interplay of light, atmosphere, humidity, and the environment.
State.Name: Azurite Weathers

State.Author: Nightfallstorm and JaySerpa
State.Description: A framework for misc items to have a description in-game. This is useful for mods that add misc items, or if you want to add more flavour to the items from the base game.
State.Name: Description Framework

State.Author: Sheson
State.Description: DynDOLOD DLL NG is a SKSE64 plugin and its accompanying papyrus scripts for the large reference bugs workarounds by DynDOLOD 3. This is used instead of PapyrusUtil / DynDOLOD DLL SE/VR.
State.Name: DynDOLOD DLL NG

State.Description: Compatible with Skyrim Special Edition 1.6.1170 from Steam
State.Name: Skyrim Script Extender (SKSE64)

Original.Name: Save and Load Accelerator For SKSE Cosaves-163969-1-3-2-1768177139.zip

State.Author: just-harry
State.Description: This plugin makes SKSE cosaves save up-to 150 times faster, and load up-to 15 times faster.
State.Name: Save and Load Accelerator for SKSE Cosaves - S.L.A.C.K.

State.Author: Nukem-perchik71
State.Description: Updating the popular mod "SSE Creation Kit Fixes" for the new version Creation Kit 1.6.438
State.Name: SSE Creation Kit Fixes Update

Original.Name: A Clear Map of Skyrim and Other Worlds FOMOD-56367-4-0-1669293184.7z

State.Author: DoubleYou
State.Description: A Clear Map of Skyrim and Other Worlds improves the map's weather to enhance visibility, modifies the map camera for optimal viewing, and adds the missing world maps of the Soul Cairn, Forgotten Vale, Blackreach, Sovngarde, and Skuldafn. Optional DynDOLOD rules can be used to add missing details to the map. Oh. Almost forgot. I also added roads!
State.Name: A Clear Map of Skyrim and Other Worlds

State.Author: Sheson
State.Description: DynDOLOD Resources SE 3 required by DynDOLOD 3 for drastically improved tree and object LOD generation.
State.Name: DynDOLOD Resources SE 3

State.Author: Kezyma
State.Description: Root Builder is a Mod Organizer 2 plugin that allows you to manage files in the base game folder through Mod Organizer, leaving your game folder in pristine, vanilla condition!
State.Name: Kezyma's Root Builder for Mod Organizer

State.Author: Sheson
State.Description: Dynamic Distant Objects LOD (DynDOLOD) is the advanced and easier version of xLODGen to generate a comprehensive LOD mod for the entire load order for drastically enhanced and better matching tree LOD and object LOD plus optional dynamic LOD, glow LOD, grass LOD, occlusion data and terrain underside in a few simple steps
State.Name: DynDOLOD 3 Alpha

State.Author: FelesNoctis-Eddoursul
State.Description: Inspired by ESMIfyer, this xEdit script targets all relevant reference types that may need to be updated (currently ACHR/REFR/PHZD), but also uses a number of filters to cut out every false positive it can conceivably target without live human intervention.
State.Name: Persistentify Those Plugins

State.Author: ProfJack and CS Team
State.Description: Community Shaders feature which simulates ambient occlusion (AO) and indirect lighting (IL) using screen space information. Supports SE and AE.
State.Name: Screen Space Global Illumination (SSGI)

State.Author: doodlez
State.Description: Community Shaders feature which adds screen-space subsurface scattering to characters, to simulate realistic skin.
State.Name: Subsurface Scattering

State.Author: doodlum alandtse
State.Description: Full upscaling suite with native game integration, major performance increase, improved visual fidelity. DLSS 4, FSR 3.1 upscaling with FSR Frame Generation.
State.Name: Upscaling - Community Shaders

State.Author: Parapets
State.Description: Simplifies the creation of Mod Configuration Menus and extends them with powerful new features, such as persistent INI settings and hotkey registration. Mod authors will be able to write simpler, cleaner Papyrus scripts for their configs. Players will be able to spend less time in menus.
State.Name: MCM Helper

State.Author: powerofthree
State.Description: SKSE plugin that adds floating subtitles over NPC heads.
State.Name: Floating Subtitles

State.Author: powerofthree
State.Description: Take snapshots of your adventures in game with Photo Mode!
State.Name: Photo Mode

Original.Name: Dynamic Things Alternative - Base Object Swapper-60741-0-4-1-1767738590.7z

State.Author: powerofthree
State.Description: Keep track of your conversations with Dialogue History. SKSE plugin.

State.Author: Flipocles
State.Description: Increase Compatibility With As Well As Optimizes And Improves Strange Runes.
State.Name: Strange Runes Compatibility - KID

State.Author: Did i mention banana flavored ice cream is the best
State.Description: This mod shows breath effect when in cold areas for the player and NPCs including creatures, but with the performance of a SKSE DLL mod! For 1.5.97/1.6.x+/VR.

State.Description: CS Light config hub for Light placer
State.Name: CS Light

State.Description: Fixes the first person hand light for magic effects
State.Name: First person magic hand light fix

State.Author: CarbonDice - Dlizzio
State.Description: An interior lighting mod that casts window shadows, designed for Community Shaders and its features.
State.Name: Window Shadows Ultimate

State.Author: Brumbek
State.Description: A massive project to greatly improve the appearance of countless static 3D models in Skyrim. Basically, this is my attempt to make the Skyrim architecture, clutter, furniture, and landscaping much nicer.
State.Name: Static Mesh Improvement Mod - SMIM

Original.Name: Static Mesh Improvement Mod Improvement Mod-55543-1-13-1-1741128505.7z

State.Author: Novelyst
State.Description: A mod to improve the topology of a few badly poorly subdivided meshes in the staple Static Mesh Improvement Mod and eliminate jaggedness in some which it does not cover.
State.Name: Static Mesh Improvement Mod Improvement Mod

State.Author: Parapets
State.Description: Improves the alchemy system with dynamic models, better item names, and more!
State.Name: Alchemy Plus

State.Author: Quantumyilmaz
State.Description: Automatically save your game based on your preferences using an in-game menu. No esp/scripts. Install/Uninstall/Update whenever. Compatible with everything.
State.Name: Auto Saver

State.Author: meh321
State.Description: Allows mod authors to create unlimited amount of new custom skills with their own perk trees.
State.Name: Custom Skills Framework

State.Author: Asciimov
State.Description: Speeds up BSA asset loading by replacing the game's outdated decompression libraries with more modern alternatives. Universal plugin that supports AE and VR
State.Name: Faster Decompression

State.Author: epinter
State.Description: Fixes media keys (volume, play/next/mute, windows key, alt+f4, etc...) by removing game's exclusive access to the keyboard. There's an option to fix deadkeys bug, and to enable Windows key.
State.Name: Media Keys Fix SKSE

State.Author: meh321
State.Description: Stops grass from growing out of rocks, floorboards, bedrolls, crates, roads and other objects. Also allows drawing grass outside of loaded cells.
State.Name: No Grass In Objects

Original.Name: PapyrusUtil AE SE - Scripting Utility Functions-13048-4-6-1705639805.zip

State.Author: exiledviper meh321
State.Description: An SKSE plugin adding several new scripts with native functions that provide various conveniences related to data storage and other misc functions to the scripter/modder.
State.Name: PapyrusUtil SE - Modders Scripting Utility Functions

State.Author: powerofthree
State.Description: SKSE plugin and framework for swapping base objects and references, using config files.
State.Name: Base Object Swapper

State.Author: powerofthree
State.Description: Display location name with music jingle when entering already discovered locations.
State.Name: Dynamic Location Pop-ups

State.Author: powerofthree
State.Description: SKSE plugin that allows you to grab AND throw objects, distracting your enemies.

State.Author: powerofthree
State.Description: SKSE plugin that makes children fight and defend themselves. No patches required.

State.Author: powerofthree
State.Description: SKSE plugin that adds projectile based water splashes and ripples, and underwater explosions.

State.Author: Nightfallstorm
State.Description: SKSE Framework plugin to allow distribution of custom races to NPC across Skyrim. Have you found a cool custom race mod for sharks, khajiit, dragonborn, kobold, etc. but wish you could see NPCs like them in the world? With this mod you can!

State.Author: meh321
State.Description: Contains header file and a database to make SKSE DLL plugins version independent easily.

State.Author: alandtse
State.Description: Generates crash logs when the game Just Works™. This is a SSE/AE/VR port using fudgyduff's MIT source. This can read PDB files that mod authors may distribute.

State.Author: powerofthree
State.Description: SKSE64 plugin that extends Papyrus script functionality, with over 275 new Papyrus functions, and 29 events.

State.Author: Mini
State.Description: Enables the replacement of XEMI records in an esp using json.

State.Author: The Unofficial Patch Project Team
State.Description: A comprehensive bugfixing mod for The Elder Scrolls V: Skyrim - Special Edition. The goal of the Unofficial Skyrim Special Edition Patch (aka USSEP) is to eventually fix every bug with Skyrim Special Edition not officially resolved by the developers to the limits of the Creation Kit and community-developed tools, in one easy-to-install package.
State.Name: Unofficial Skyrim Special Edition Patch - USSEP

State.Description: This is a homepage for my newly released Wabbajack, The Method to Madness.

State.Description: Improves many files of the great SMIM Mod, providing  visual upgrades

State.Author: Seb263

State.Description: Additional far object LOD resources for use with DynDOLOD. Features the ability to add roads to the map via object LOD.

State.Author: brucio and Vorganger
State.Description: Consistency patch between Untarnished UI and ImGui icons.

State.Description: SkyPrompt adds an in-game prompt and interaction system to Skyrim, using ImGui for the UI.

State.Author: DoubleYou
State.Description: ACMOS Road Generator paints roads and/or paths on your xLODGen generated terrain LOD, giving you a perfect world map with roads that matches your installed landscape mods. All major worldspace mods are supported.

State.Description: Hair Specular is a community shaders feature, providing artist-friendly and realistic hair shading to Skyrim.

State.Author: RELight Team
State.Description: Official light configs for RELight.
State.Name: RELight - Official Light Addon

State.Author: TheShinyHaxorus
State.Description: Adds camera-based and movement inertia to the first person weapon/viewmodel, like most modern shooters. Brings life to first person whether you use custom animations or vanilla, highly customizable and configurable, replaces and overhauls several vanilla first person visual features as well such as walking, jumping, landing, etc.
State.Name: First Person (FP) Inertia - SKSE

State.Author: powerofthree - Kreiste - wSkeever
State.Description: Adds 11 new lock models for Security Overhaul SKSE - Lock Variations

State.Description: Additional variant lock models for Security Overhaul SKSE - Lock Variations
State.Name: Security Overhaul SKSE - Lock Add-ons

State.Author: Alaxouche - Parapets
State.Description: Bethesda Plugin Manager - Extended is a total revampt of the Parapet's Mod Organizer 2 addon. Compatible with mo2 2.5.2, it fixes various issues from the base project, adds a tons of new options, optimizes performance and refresh time, made most of the changes modular and applied workarounds for features i found annoying.
State.Name: Bethesda Plugin Manager - Extended

State.Author: Dlizzio - isoprophlex - DrJacopo
State.Description: Ambient templates designed for a modular interior lighting setup, utilizing SkyPatcher for conflict-free cell modification.

State.Description: Displays a splash screen while launching the game with SKSE.

State.Description: Community Shaders feature which casts shadows from clouds. Supports SE, AE, and VR.
State.Name: Cloud Shadows

State.Author: MaskedRPGFan
State.Description: Created from scratch MCM for Frozen Electrocuted Combustion by powerofthree to support MCM Helper. Saves settings as you change them, automatically loads settings on startup or game load so you don't have to spend time in MCM again with each game. Localization support. No plugin.

Original.Name: Moons And Stars - Sky Overhaul SKSE-73336-2-0-2-1665609139.7z

State.Description: DLL plugin to fix moons and stars movement and phases.
State.Name: Moons and Stars - Sky Overhaul SKSE

State.Author: zhitsak
State.Description: A SKSE plugin that lets you add custom effects to items when they are activated or hit. You can make things happen like spawning items, impact data sets, actors, casting spells, creating explosions, playing sounds, and swapping objects - all controlled with JSON files.
State.Name: Object Impact Framework (OIF)

State.Author: powerofthree
State.Description: SKSE plugin that enables friendly fire amongst allied NPCs.
State.Name: Enemy Friendly Fire

State.Author: powerofthree
State.Description: Simple SKSE plugin which enables sneak attacks with magic
State.Name: Magic Sneak Attacks

State.Author: powerofthree
State.Description: Makes the game always load certain records from plugins instead of save, such as NPC weight and persistent ref position

Original.Name: Scrambled Bugs - Anniversary Edition (1.6.629.0 and later)-43532-21-1678779028.7z

State.Author: Magicockerel
State.Description: A collection of engine bug fixes and patches.
State.Name: Scrambled Bugs

State.Author: wheelabout
State.Description: Alternate Start Reborn reimagines the starting experience in Alternate Start - Live Another Life. Instead of waking in a dark prison cell, you begin in a dreamlike Ayleid ruin, surrounded by mystical light and ancient stone. This is a purely aesthetic change—functionality remains the same, allowing you to choose your path as before.
State.Name: Alternate Start Reborn

State.Author: Arthmoor
State.Description: Live Another Life provides an alternative means to start the game for those who do not wish to go through the lengthy intro sequence at Helgen.
State.Name: Alternate Start - Live Another Life - SSE

State.Author: sharrken
State.Description: A high-definition restoration of Skyrim's orignal voices and music, drawing from the much higher quality PS4 audio as a source.

State.Author: Quantumyilmaz
State.Description: SkyPrompt adds an in-game prompt and interaction system to Skyrim, using ImGui for the UI.
State.Name: SkyPrompt

State.Author: Expired
State.Description: Complete overhaul to the character creation menu including new customization features such as multiple RGBA warpaints, body paints, hand paint, and foot paints. (Requires SKSE)

State.Author: Nightfallstorm
State.Description: Collection of fixes, tweaks and performance improvements for Skyrim's script engine. 100% configurable. Install/Uninstall anytime.

State.Author: riverwood doodlez profjack
State.Description: Community Shaders feature which adds wetness effects on shores and on characters and surfaces when it is raining. Supports SE, AE, and VR.

State.Description: Increase Compatibility With As Well As Optimizes And Improves Strange Runes.

State.Description: Automatically stores files decompressed during play for faster startup and loading times. Universal plugin that supports SE/AE/VR.

State.Author: Thiago
State.Description: This mod adds a new dynamic menu to the game that allows SKSE mods to add their own custom pages using the original Dear ImGui api
State.Name: SKSE Menu Framework

State.Author: powerofthree
State.Description: Fixes free camera position and other issues caused by the game not serializing certain camera data to save

State.Description: SKSE plugin that improves death/ragdoll camera, with free rotation/fly camera and other features
State.Name: Enhanced Death Cam

State.Description: SKSE plugin that adds splashes and ripples when raining
State.Name: Splashes of Storms

State.Author: Nightfallstorm

State.Author: shadeMe
State.Description: A SKSE64 plugin that adds support for unvoiced in-game dialog,
State.Name: Fuz Ro D-oh - Silent Voice

State.Author: Maxsu doodlez
State.Description: Community Shaders feature which adds player collision to grass shaders with minimal performance impact.
State.Name: Grass Collision

State.Author: doodlum
State.Description: Community Shaders addon which makes terrain realistically blend into objects
State.Name: Terrain Blending - Community Shaders

State.Author: MaskedRPGFan
State.Description: Created from scratch MCM for Strange Runes by powerofthree to support MCM Helper. Saves settings as you change them, automatically loads settings on startup or game load, imports settings from an existing save, so you don't have to spend time in MCM again with each game. Localization support. No plugin.
State.Name: Strange Runes - Settings Loader

State.Author: RavenKZP
State.Description:
Particle Wind makes all particle effects in the game react to wind speed and direction, increasing realism and immersion. 

It runs at the engine level via SKSE, making it fully compatible with particles added by the vanilla game, DLC, and mods – without mesh swapping or conflicts.
State.Name: Particle Wind - SKSE Plugin

State.Author: powerofthree
State.Description: SKSE plugin that removes unnecessary NPC only/broken headparts from Racemenu
State.Name: Headpart Whitelist

State.Author: Quantumyilmaz
State.Description: Load Time Profiler measures and displays how long your mods take during game startup, helping you identify what's slowing things down and optimize your load order.
State.Name: Load Time Profiler

State.Author: Dlizzio
State.Description: Utilizes HDR tonemapping from Community Shaders to the fullest extent, delivering ENB-like visuals without the performance tradeoff.
State.Name: Azurite III CS

State.Author: effervessence - Minizbot2012
State.Description: Makes window emittance consistent and sensible across all exterior spaces.
State.Name: Window Emittance Consistency (WEC)

State.Author: TheShinyHaxorus
State.Description: Adds inertia and settle to the first person camera when moving around, firing arrows, jumping, landing, sprinting, etc. Completely adjustable to be as exaggerated or subtle as you want. Try it and see if it's for you.
State.Name: First Person (FP) Camera Settle - SKSE

State.Author: powerofthree
State.Description: SKSE plugin that makes paralysis spells freeze the target in place.
State.Name: Classic Paralysis

State.Author: powerofthree
State.Description: SKSE plugin that allows you to zoom and inspect items in crafting and magic menus

State.Author: powerofthree
State.Description: SKSE plugin that prevents neutral NPCs from turning hostile when you accidentally hit them.

State.Author: Seb263
State.Description: Fixes all issues with stats, attributes, and levels when changing race from the character creation menu. It's standalone, script-free, pluginless, and aims to complete what I started with ShowRaceMenu Alternative back in 2012.
State.Name: ShowRaceMenu - NG

State.Author: meh321
State.Description: Improves the telekinesis spell in many ways, check full list of features in description of mod.

State.Author: Parapets and Jelidity
State.Description: Inserts interesting information, including item icons, into inventory interface. Importantly, its innocuous injection implementation intrinsically ignores independently installed interface improvements.

Original.Name: Unofficial Skyrim Creation Club Content Patch-18975-8-2-1746071153.zip

State.Author: garthand

State.Author: The Cursed Crypts Team
State.Description: As a supplement to the amazing Modern Lighting Overhaul, Cursed Crypts makes your dungeons a magical yet eerie place to explore.

State.Author: Parapets
State.Description: Improves the usability of the Constructible Object Menu with SkyUI with an extensible keyword-based category system.

State.Author: powerofthree
State.Description: SKSE based framework for restricting item equip/spell cast if requirements are not met, using keywords.

State.Author: SlavicPotato

State.Author: doodlum
State.Description: Community Shaders feature which replaces grass shaders. Includes a directional light fix, point lights, improved lighting and emulated complex grass.

State.Description: SKSE plugin which allows Skyrim to read additional texture slots from landscape records. Initially only allows for height slot in addition to diffuse and normal (no need for parallax in alpha of diffuse anymore!)
State.Name: Terrain Helper for ENB

State.Author: powerofthree
State.Description: SKSE plugin that dynamically randomizes ingredient effects on game load or per playthrough.
State.Name: Alchemy Effect Randomizer SKSE

State.Author: powerofthree
State.Description: Configurable SKSE plugin that changes ash pile names to reflect who they belong to.
State.Name: Name Those Ash Piles

State.Author: Legendman2009 - Wired1Up - Truman
State.Description: RE::Light is a SKSE, JSON-based configurable lighting framework for Skyrim that comes with a in game menu for real time light editing powered by SKSE Menu Framework.
State.Name: ReLight

State.Author: powerofthree
State.Description: Collection of engine bug fixes and tweaks. SKSE plugin.
State.Name: powerofthree's Tweaks

State.Author: CS Team
State.Description: Advanced Community Shaders feature which simulates large scale world-space ambient occlusion. Supports SE, AE, and VR.
State.Name: Skylighting

State.Author: wheelabout
State.Description: Alternate Start Reborn reimagines the starting experience in Alternate Start - Live Another Life. Instead of waking in a dark prison cell, you begin in a dreamlike Ayleid ruin, surrounded by mystical light and ancient stone. This is a purely aesthetic change—functionality remains the same, allowing you to choose your path as before.
State.Name: Alternate Start Reborn

State.Author: sharrken
State.Description: A high-definition restoration of Skyrim's orignal voices and music, drawing from the much higher quality PS4 audio as a source.
State.Name: Unofficial High Definition Audio Project

State.Author: SkyUI Team
State.Description: Elegant, PC-friendly interface mod with many advanced features.
State.Name: SkyUI

State.Author: doodlez and Mathieu C
State.Description: Community Shaders feature which adds screen-space shadows, enabling grass, map, distant and self-shadows.
State.Name: Screen-Space Shadows

State.Author: powerofthree
State.Description: Player automatically sandboxes when idle.
State.Name: Sandbox When Idle

Original.Name: Actor Limit Fix - Anniversary Edition (1.6.629.0 and later)-32349-9-1678780488.7z

State.Author: meh321
State.Description: Increases the number of actors that can move, make facial expressions, and have their lips synced to their voice lines at any given time.
State.Name: Actor Limit Fix

State.Author: BingusEx
State.Description: A simple CommonlibSSE-NG plugin that tries to fix stuck key inputs when alt-tabbing in and out of the game.
State.Name: Alt-Tab Stuck Key Fix NG

State.Author: powerofthree
State.Description: SKSE plugin. Adds copy paste into console and caches console commands between game sessions
State.Name: ConsolePlusPlus

State.Author: powerofthree
State.Description: SKSE plugin that makes children killable. No patches required.
State.Name: Slayable Offspring SKSE

State.Author: powerofthree
State.Description: Simple SKSE plugin that allows you to use/equip/eat/drink OR take items
State.Name: Use or Take SKSE

State.Author: Quantumyilmaz
State.Description: Allows the game resolution to be set to your Windows display resolution automatically.
State.Name: Auto Resolution

State.Author: Zzyxzz
State.Description:
SkyPatcher(also known as RobCo Patcher from Fallout 4), is a patcher based on SKSE and CommonLibSSE, which allows mod authors and users to modify game data without the use of plugins.

You can modify ammos, npcs, races, weapons, modify leveled lists, formlists, containers and more. Easy and fast.
State.Name: SkyPatcher

Original.Name: Untarnished UI - ImGui Icons Patch - Fonts-159543-1-0-1-1764036125.7z

State.Author: brucio and Vorganger
State.Description: Consistency patch between Untarnished UI and ImGui icons.
State.Name: Untarnished UI - ImGui Icons Patch

State.Author: Jiaye
State.Description: Hair Specular is a community shaders feature, providing artist-friendly and realistic hair shading to Skyrim.
State.Name: Hair Specular - Community Shaders

State.Author: Loki
State.Description: SKSE Plugin to redefine how you interact with water. On top of slowing you and NPCs down, this introduces a FO4-esque Power Armour system where you will walk underwater if wearing full heavy armour
State.Name: Sink Or Swim

State.Author: powerofthree
State.Description: SKSE plugin that improves and fixes bugs with Reanimation effects.
State.Name: Enhanced Reanimation

State.Author: powerofthree
State.Description: SKSE plugin that distributes keywords to weapons/armor/magic effects/ingestibles and other items, using config files.
State.Name: Keyword Item Distributor (KID)

State.Author: davo0411
State.Description: A comprehensive terrain tiling fix for community shaders, that works with all landscape systems and texture types, without any reduction in quality.
State.Name: Terrain Variation - Community Shaders

State.Author: LokiWasTaken
State.Description:
SKSE Plugin to redefine how you interact with water. On top of slowing you and NPCs down, this introduces a FO4-esque Power Armour system where you will walk underwater if wearing full heavy armour.



Now converted to CLIB-NG for AE/VR users.
State.Name: Sink Or Swim NG

State.Author: TheShinyHaxorus
State.Description: Plays a short noise when your main menu is fully loaded. Useful if you use a large modlist or have long startup times. Alt+tab or walk away worry-free. SKSE Plugin.
State.Name: Menu Load Indicator - SKSE

State.Author: powerofthree
State.Description: Fixes a bug where you don't get XP for discovering ingredient effects when creating a potion
State.Name: Alchemy XP Fix

State.Author: powerofthree
State.Description: SKSE plugin and framework that automatically generates smelting and tempering recipes for weapons/armor/clutter. No patches or patching required.
State.Name: Crafting Recipe Distributor

State.Author: powerofthree
State.Description: Simple SKSE plugin that allows you to read OR take books
State.Name: Read Or Take SKSE

State.Author: powerofthree-sasnikol
State.Description: SKSE plugin that can be used to add spells/perks/items/shouts/packages/outfits/keywords/factions to every NPC in the game, using config files.
State.Name: Spell Perk Item Distributor (SPID)

State.Author: aers - Nukem - Ryan
State.Description: skse64 plugin to fix various issues with the Skyrim Special Edition engine.
State.Name: SSE Engine Fixes (skse64 plugin)

State.Author: Fuzzles
State.Description: Small tweak to add locks to the Soul Cairn chests, as vanilla does not have any.
State.Name: Soul-Cairn Objects Secured

State.Author: Parapets
State.Description: Ever get annoyed that you can't plug your headphones in or out while the game is running? Now you can switch outputs painlessly.
State.Name: Auto Audio Switch

State.Author: Alaxouche
State.Description: A script-free SKSE plugin that fixes references incorrectly disabled/deleted to reduce micro-stutters and issues. Dynamically scans and patches all your loaded cells directly ingame. Highly configurable.
State.Name: Disabled Reference Integrity Fix (SKSE)

State.Author: MaskedRPGFan
State.Description: SKSE plugin that allows you to add Forms to FormLists at game startup using configuration files In order to reduce the number of conflicts between mods. Created with CommonLibSSE-NG for Skyrim SE, AE, and VR.
State.Name: FormList Manipulator - FLM

State.Author: powerofthree
State.Description: Fixes some grammatical errors with dynamic text replacement for French and other languages
State.Name: Language Fixes SKSE

State.Author: powerofthree
State.Description: SKSE plugin that stops vampires from casting shadows when out in the sun.
State.Name: Vampires Cast No Shadow 2

State.Author: sicsix
State.Description: Synchronizes lighting and volumetric lighting to the sun and moons, including an alternate sun path, various fixes, and supports AE, SE and VR.
State.Name: Sky Sync - Community Shaders

State.Author: Kitsuune
State.Description: SKSE plugin that adds/extends editor ID lookup functionality and makes the engine's string formatting safer
State.Name: Native EditorID Fix

State.Author: powerofthree
State.Description: SKSE plugin and framework for swapping AnimObjects, using config files.
State.Name: AnimObject Swapper

State.Author: powerofthree
State.Description: SKSE plugin that prevents favorited items from being sold, crafted, disarmed, disenchanted, or dropped.
State.Name: Essential Favorites

State.Author: aglowinthefield
State.Description: A total rewrite and overhaul of the FOMOD experience. Show and install previous choices, filter your modlist by FOMOD-installed mods, scan to pre-populate FOMOD content detection, non-blocking, smart-resizing installer window, and more!
State.Name: FOMOD Plus - A Mod Installation Overhaul for Mod Organizer 2

State.Author: wheelabout
State.Description: Alternate Start Reborn reimagines the starting experience in Alternate Start - Live Another Life. Instead of waking in a dark prison cell, you begin in a dreamlike Ayleid ruin, surrounded by mystical light and ancient stone. This is a purely aesthetic change—functionality remains the same, allowing you to choose your path as before.

State.Description: SKSE plugin that fixes a vanilla bug which causes the game to treat dual cast spells as if they were single cast.

State.Description: Makes horses turn much better

State.Description: Ever get annoyed that you can't use your mouse with your gamepad plugged in? Now you can switch between them painlessly.

State.Description: Eliminates the dreaded "dark face" issue that occurs when the game encounters FaceGen errors.
